prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-CAPLIGHT-GRN-FL610-24CL Product Type: FLASHLIGHT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: 200 Lumen LED Camping Clip On Cap Light - Green Description: While traditional headlamps might be more powerful, they do not compare to the convenience, weight and ease of use when up against the ASR Outdoor 200 Lumen LED Clip On Hat Baseball Cap Headlamp Light. A great alternative to a more complex headlamp, the cap light easily clips on to any baseball cap, visor or hardhat and features an easy to use push button to turn it on and off.

Multifunctional in nature, the LED clip on cap light boasts a 200 lumen brightness, providing ample illumination for a variety of different tasks, whether you're taking the baseball cap light to the job site, working on hobbies or home improvement projects, making auto or mechanical repairs, trail running afterhours, reading, gardening, trekking, hunting, camping, climbing, backpacking, fishing and more. The LED cap light is also a great item to add to any bug out bag or survival kit too, in case of emergency.

Requiring just three (3) AAA batteries to operate, you don't need to worry about charging before your activity or trip or any USB cables, power cords and the like. In addition, due to its lightweight and compact design, the baseball cap light won't add any extra weight to your hat, head or neck when you're on the go, providing you with hands-free lighting.

A great addition to any outdoor enthusiast's camping gear, travel gear or backpacking gear, the lightweight clip on headlight will allow you to work efficiently, excursion safely or read leisurely without having to worry about other lighting sources like lamps, lanterns, candles or bulky uncomfortable headlamps. Search Terms: fishing hat light camping cap for bikes biking cycling baseball beach mens golf tactical hiking gear head lamp led headlamp Features: - 200 LUMEN BRIGHTNESS: If you need lighting when working, trekking or camping in the wilderness, the ASR Outdoor Clip On Hat Baseball Cap Headlamp Light easily replaces a traditional headlamp or hat light for ample and bright LED lighting; battery operated - HANDS FREE LIGHTING: With an integrated clip, the hat baseball cap light easily attaches to the brim of most baseball caps, a visor or a hardhat; the clip on light features a quick on and off switch button, giving you 200 lumens of hands free lighting with just the push of a button; can also be used as a handheld flashlight if needed - MULTIFUNCTIONAL: The 200 lumen LED baseball cap headlamp light is bright enough to use on job or construction sites, when gardening, for after hours running or walking, for mechanical or auto repairs, hobbies, outdoor sports, camping, hiking, trekking, backpacking and more; the LED hat light is also a great item to add to your vehicle emergency tote, bug out bag or survival kit - LIGHTWEIGHT: Weighing less than an ounce, the ASR Outdoor Clip On Hat Baseball Cap Headlamp Light is lightweight and won't add any extra strenuous weight to your hat, head or neck once securely clipped on - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 3.5" (L) x 2.5" (w); Material: ABS Plastic; Brightness: 200 Lumens; Bulbs: Two (2) Watt COB; Three (3) AAA Batteries included; Weight: === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 200 Lumen Green LED Clip On Cap Light

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor Green Clip On Cap Light

anthropic.title_differentiation: 200 Lumens, Hands-Free Headlamp, Clips To Baseball Caps And Hats, Battery Operated, Lightweight

openai.title_differentiation: 200 Lumen LED, Hands Free Hat Clip Light, Battery Powered, Lightweight, Fits Baseball Caps Visors And Hardhats
